steps.t: The stones can be found among the goblins of Goblin-town. The runic inscription is held by Ánraig, east of Gwaelband in the ruins of Annúminas. Dardúr…
Nerbeglir can be found in Malenhad in Angmar. Wargs can be found in Angmar, the Misty Mountains, and Forochel. Dardúr now requires Neekerbreeker-horns…
Gruglok may be found at Urugarth in Angmar. Azgoth and Mormoz may be found at Carn Dûm in Angmar. Dardúr now needs Gruglok's Sigil of War and a Rune o…
